title: fix: BYOP attribution - redirect_url matching and device-flow
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Fixing the BYOP paper trail
gist.blurb: We squashed a bug that was hiding attribution data for Bring-Your-Own-Key apps. The hive's accounting is back in perfect order!
gist.summary: Resolved a D1 database error in redirect URL matching and fixed missing metadata in device-flow authorizations to ensure accurate BYOP attribution.
gist.impact: Traffic and usage generated by third-party apps using custom keys will now be correctly attributed to the developers.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as an accountant or archivist, organizing data. She's wearing tiny reading glasses and holding a clipboard, successfully sorting glowing data packets into the correct app folders.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses and holding a clipboard, happily organizing glowing data packets into neatly labeled folders. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, its screen showing a bright green checkmark. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
